use_cases: Trigger form submissions and action handlers in web applications
Provide navigation triggers for internal and external links
Enable user interactions with hover and focus feedback states
Support accessibility with keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility
Serve as primary or secondary call-to-action elements in UI layouts
ai_summary: A flexible, accessible button component built with Radix UI's Slot and class-variance-authority for variant-based styling. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon) with hover, focus, and disabled states. Designed as a foundational UI primitive suitable for any React application requiring consistent action triggers.
